signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation and Warsh Nomination Delay
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation and Warsh Nomination Delays** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3]

Federal Reserve Chair **Jerome Powell** stated he will serve as chair pro tem past his May term end if successor **Kevin Warsh** is not Senate-confirmed, per federal law precedent[1][2][3]. He also affirmed no intent to leave the board
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?
